text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything you'd like to ask of me?
Reviewing notes, creating schedules—just name
it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well... I think I'll pass on those two suggestions.
Let me think...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I got it! ☆ This is a special ask for my special
day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, Flash, can you call me Falco? Pretty
please? ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you say I could ask you for anything? And
you meant it, right?
